name: Maintenance Task
about: Address technical debt or structural refactoring
title: '[MAINT] '
labels: 'maintenance, tech-debt'
assignees: ''
---

**Description**
A clear and concise description of the maintenance task or structural refactoring to be performed.

**Roadmap Milestone Reference**
Does this address a specific item in `ROADMAP.md`? (e.g., Architecture, Code Quality, Security)
- [ ] Yes, it resolves a roadmap item. (Please specify which one: __________)
- [ ] No, it is an unplanned maintenance task.

**Proposed Changes**
Describe the structural, architectural, or code quality changes you plan to make. For core logic (e.g., recruitment, dose-finding), please follow the guidelines in `CONTRIBUTING.md`.

**Checklist**
- [ ] I have read the `CONTRIBUTING.md` guidelines for core maintenance.
- [ ] My changes follow the standardized procedures for high-complexity core modules.
